message:
test(rangeset): expand from 5 to 45 tests for integer range set (wa-1lt6z)

40 new tests covering: free functions (range_is_empty, intersects_range,
range_intersection, range_subtract, range_union), RangeSet construction
(new, default), contains, len, add_range_unchecked, add_set, remove_set,
intersection, intersection_with_range, iter_values, From<RangeSet> for
Vec, Clone/PartialEq, and edge cases (empty ranges, adjacent merging,
overlapping merging, middle removal, nonexistent removal).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
